name: JFLA Holdings Inc.
summary: JFLA Holdings Inc. operates and franchises restaurants in Japan. It franchises Gyukaku and Toriden restaurants, as well as operates sweets brand GOKOKU. The company also manufactures, processes, wholesales, and retails soy sauce, Japanese seasoning, miso, pickles, sake, alcoholic beverages, soft drinks, and food products; imports, wholesales, and retails fine foods, confectionery materials, and wine; and wholesales general food for business use. In addition, it offers milk and dairy products; and engages in breeding of calves. The company was formerly known as Walnut Street Group Holding Limited and changed its name to JFLA Holdings Inc. in 2018. JFLA Holdings Inc. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
